taskTypes.description: Learner-facing practice-harness UI, scoring, feedback, modal, glossary, or browser flow work.
blocksHandoffWhen: Browser QA is missing for a learner-facing change.
A result appears outside the required modal flow.
A learner can pass without the planned objective, hints, retry loop, or unlock artifact.

taskTypes.description: Main lecture-cuts deck, metadata, source map, presenter review, handoff, hook, or reproduction contract work.
blocksHandoffWhen: Any pre-handoff hook exits non-zero.
Slide count, order, hash, title, speaker source, or source-sensitive coverage drifts without explanation.
Handoff omits command and exit-status evidence.

taskTypes.description: Generated deck harness, slide spec, asset pack, source map, glossary, visual polish, or generated deck workflow work.

verifierProfiles.role: deck-harness syntax, source, render, presenter, glossary, and handoff verifier

blocksHandoffWhen: Generated deck schema or source map has unresolved references.
Browser render evidence is missing.
Glossary, presenter review, or visual quality failures are unowned.

taskTypes.description: Context research pack, source ledger, claim support, or research-agent workflow work.

verifierProfiles.role: context research pack and evidence-quality reviewer

blocksHandoffWhen: The pack is outside the project root.
Source ledger or claim support rows are missing.
A date-sensitive claim lacks checked-date evidence.

taskTypes.description: Code implementation, refactor, bug fix, CLI, API, or test change that needs executable regression evidence.

verifierProfiles.role: task-specific code correctness, regression, and contract verifier

evidenceCommands: focused regression fixture for changed behavior
blocksHandoffWhen: A changed behavior lacks a focused regression or clear reason it cannot be automated.
Syntax/type/lint checks are skipped without justification.
The verifier cannot explain false-positive or false-negative risk for heuristic findings.

taskTypes.description: HTML, generated, or lecture slide deck output where source/spec, render, asset meaning, presenter separation, and teaching flow matter.

verifierProfiles.role: slide source-contract, render, presenter, asset, and teaching-flow verifier

blocksHandoffWhen: Rendered slides are not checked in desktop, projector, and mobile-like viewports.
Speaker-only or source content leaks into the audience view.
Slide meaning, asset teaching role, or adjacent-slide job separation is unverified.

taskTypes.description: PowerPoint or .pptx deck review where file integrity, slide order, visual/text fit, notes, export compatibility, and audience fit matter.

verifierProfiles.role: PPTX structure, visual fit, speaker notes, export, and narrative-flow verifier

evidenceCommands: visual export or screenshot check when available
blocksHandoffWhen: The .pptx cannot be parsed or opened by the available verifier.
Slide count, order, notes, or media inventory is unknown.
Text fit, visual overlap, or export compatibility is not inspected.

taskTypes.description: Schedule, roadmap, calendar, task plan, meeting plan, or delivery checklist where dependencies, owners, dates, buffers, and conflicts matter.

verifierProfiles.role: schedule dependency, owner, deadline, conflict, buffer, and risk verifier

mandatoryReads: timezone or calendar assumptions when relevant
evidenceCommands: structured schedule consistency check when available
blocksHandoffWhen: A task lacks owner, due date, dependency status, or completion condition.
Date conflicts, impossible ordering, missing buffers, or timezone assumptions are unexamined.
Critical path or handoff risk is not named.

taskTypes.description: Written report, policy, PRD, plan, guide, or narrative document where claims, audience fit, contradictions, source support, and actionability matter.

verifierProfiles.role: document claim-support, contradiction, audience-fit, and actionability verifier

evidenceCommands: document structure or schema check when available
blocksHandoffWhen: Material claims lack support or currentness evidence.
Contradictions, undefined terms, or missing decisions remain unowned.
The document does not match its intended reader or use.

taskTypes.description: Operational checklist, runbook, launch checklist, incident procedure, or recurring task checklist where idempotency, rollback, ownership, and evidence matter.

verifierProfiles.role: runbook precondition, execution evidence, idempotency, rollback, and owner verifier

evidenceCommands: dry-run or syntax check when available
blocksHandoffWhen: A step lacks precondition, expected evidence, owner, or rollback path.
Repeated execution is not idempotent or contamination risk is unexamined.
Escalation and stop conditions are absent.

taskTypes.description: Authentication, authorization, tool permission, secret, dependency, network, hook, or MCP security-sensitive work.
evidenceCommands: dependency or secret scan when available
blocksHandoffWhen: A tool or file permission expands without explicit justification.
Secret material is exposed.
The report lacks exploitability or impact analysis.

taskTypes.description: Fallback for code, docs, or workflow changes without a more specific route.

verifierProfiles.role: task-specific verifier generated from changed files and user acceptance criteria

evidenceCommands: syntax or schema checks for changed artifacts
blocksHandoffWhen: No relevant verification command was run or justified as unavailable.
A known changed contract lacks a matching test or review note.
The final verdict omits residual risk.
